claims_verified.claim: AC1: defaults unchanged — developer/rw1/clarify->Claude default, rw2->claude/sonnet, senior->claude/opus
claims_verified.evidence: run.py:96-105 _legacy_role_cmd returns DEFAULT_RW2_CMD/DEFAULT_SENIOR_CMD/DEFAULT_CLAUDE_CMD; tests/test_role_runner.py test_default_* all pass (140 passed)

claims_verified.claim: AC2: ROLE_RW2_VENDOR=codex yields CodexRunner with no code change, others stay Claude
claims_verified.evidence: run.py:107-129 _resolve_runner branches on binding.vendor; test_rw2_vendor_codex_yields_codex_runner + test_only_named_role_is_switched_others_stay_claude pass

claims_verified.claim: AC3: model threads into --model flag (replace-in-place vs append), thinking threads into codex -c model_reasoning_effort= and is a no-op for claude
claims_verified.evidence: agents.py:148-161 set_model_flag; run.py:118-128; tests test_claude_model_override_replaces_existing_model, test_codex_model_and_thinking_threaded, test_claude_thinking_is_documented_noop pass

claims_verified.claim: AC4: uniform resolver, per-role factories removed
claims_verified.evidence: run.py:139-141 single make_runner=_resolve_runner; make_rw2_runner/make_senior_runner deleted; test_deps_has_single_role_keyed_resolver asserts not hasattr
ruff 'All checks passed!'; basedpyright '0 errors, 1548 warnings'; pytest '686 passed'

claims_verified.claim: Invalid vendor is fail-closed (ConfigError), not silent fallback
Deleted .laddy/specs/*.md are divergence artifacts (origin/main advanced past merge-base), not branch scope creep
claims_verified.evidence: git log origin/main..HEAD -- those paths is empty; merge-base c8893d7 predates origin/main 0b7f1bd which added them

claims_verified.claim: pyproject enableTypeIgnoreComments change does not mask new-code errors
claims_verified.evidence: grep 'type: ignore' in config.py/agents.py/run.py returns nothing (rc=1)

findings.summary: enableTypeIgnoreComments=true is a gate-config change outside the spec's declared 'In' file set (run.py/agents.py/env examples/tests); it is a justified reproducibility fix for pre-existing suppressions and does not affect new-code type checking, but it is technically scope-adjacent.

Codex thinking-only path (ROLE_*_VENDOR=codex + THINKING but no MODEL) appends '-c model_reasoning_effort=' independently of model; only the combined model+thinking case is tested directly, though the branches are independent and each is exercised.

test_assessment: AC1 covered by test_default_roles_are_claude_with_default_cmd/test_default_rw2_is_claude_sonnet/test_default_senior_is_claude_opus/test_legacy_cmd_env_overrides_still_flow_through and test_config.test_rw2_defaults_to_claude_sonnet_and_env_overrides. AC2 by test_rw2_vendor_codex_yields_codex_runner/test_only_named_role_is_switched_others_stay_claude/test_vendor_value_is_case_insensitive. AC3 by test_claude_model_override_appends/replaces, test_codex_model_and_thinking_threaded, test_claude_thinking_is_documented_noop, test_model_without_vendor_defaults_to_claude. AC4 by test_deps_has_single_role_keyed_resolver/test_every_role_resolves_through_the_same_function. AC5 verified by running ruff (clean), basedpyright (0 errors), pytest (686 passed). New functions have failure-mode tests: set_model_flag (empty cmd, trailing bare --model, replace-vs-append), _parse_role_bindings (blank value ignored, unknown knob/prefix near-misses, invalid vendor ConfigError, partial fields None, generic unknown-role parsing), role_bindings immutability.
residual_risks: Codex '-c model_reasoning_effort=<v>' flag/placement correctness depends on the real codex CLI accepting a global -c override on 'codex exec' after --full-auto; not exercisable in unit tests (no live model), so this rests on the documented codex convention.

make_runner signature changed from (config) to (config, role) across all call sites and Deps injection; verified all in-tree callers updated (grep) and full suite green, but any out-of-tree caller of the old signature would break.
